ListItem.Para: Associated pump selector ON and OFF positions operate normally.
Opposite center system EMP operates normally.
Associated pump selector is ON for all operations.

OperationProcedure.Para: Set the associated C1 or C2 ELEC pump selector ON.

ListItem.Para: Both center system pump selector ON and OFF positions operate normally.
Left and right system EMP selector AUTO positions operate normally.
Both center system pump selectors are ON for takeoff and landing.

OperationProcedure.Para: Set both the C1 ELEC and C2 ELEC pump selectors ON for takeoff and landing. Set one center system pump selector OFF at all other times.

ListItem.Para: Left pump selector ON and OFF positions operate normally.
Center system EMP selector AUTO positions operate normally.
Nitrogen generation system is considered inoperative.
Left pump selector is ON for takeoff and landing.
Repairs are made within 10 flight days.

Note.Para: The airplane must also be dispatched using MEL item 47-11-01-01.

OperationProcedure.Para: Set the L ELEC pump selector ON for takeoff and landing and OFF at all other times.

Note.Para: The HYD PRESS DEM L advisory message will be displayed when the L ELEC pump selector is OFF.

ListItem.Para: Right pump selector ON and OFF positions operate normally.
Center system EMP selector AUTO positions operate normally.
Right pump selector is ON for takeoff and landing.

OperationProcedure.Para: Set the R ELEC pump selector ON for takeoff and landing and OFF at all other times.

Note.Para: The HYD PRESS DEM R advisory message will be displayed when the R ELEC pump selector is OFF.

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: May be inoperative provided the AUTO and OFF positions for associated pump operate normally.
